title: Genre-Specific Shot Libraries
objective: Build genre-specific shot pattern libraries for thriller sub-genres and non-thriller genres. Each library provides idiom modifications, rhythm signatures, evaluation weight adjustments, and representative shot sequences.
storyQuestions: How does a psychological thriller's shot grammar differ from a procedural's?
Can genre-specific patterns be expressed as delta overlays on the base system?
What are the genre-defining shots (3-5 patterns that immediately signal a genre)?
How should genre hybridization work (noir + procedural)?
baseAcceptanceChecks: 6 genre libraries each with idiom mods, rhythm signature, evaluation weights, 3 example sequences
